title: Microsoft plans first-ever voluntary employee buyout for up to 7% of U.S. workforce
summary_full: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
summary_public: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.
